text.title: Weekly RAG Spotcheck Protocol Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every Weekly RAG Spotcheck Protocol application MUST enforce. HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Sample of 20 rows is stratified across known cohorts (head / tail / new / failed-last-week).

rationale.source: Weekly RAG Spotcheck Protocol authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Convenience sampling biases toward head traffic; stratification surfaces tail regressions.

rule.statement: Judge rubric is versioned; rubric change triggers a full re-baseline, not a silent comparison.

rationale.source: Weekly RAG Spotcheck Protocol authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Comparing scores across rubric versions yields false-positive regressions.

rule.statement: Report names the top-3 row-level regressions vs last week with verbatim snippet + suspected driver.

rationale.source: Weekly RAG Spotcheck Protocol authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Aggregate scores hide which rows drove the change; verbatim + driver makes it actionable.

rule.statement: Each action item routed to indexer OR embedder OR prompt owner; no 'team' bucket.

rationale.source: Weekly RAG Spotcheck Protocol authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Aggregate ownership = no ownership; per-driver routing matches the fix surface.

rule.statement: Spotcheck runs every 7 days; missed weeks logged with reason.

rationale.source: Weekly RAG Spotcheck Protocol authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Lapsed cadence loses signal; explicit log preserves the trend.

section.title: Conclusion targets used by the decision tree

rule.statement: Run the full procedure; emit an artefact passing the output contract.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions hold.

rule.statement: Skip; surface the missing precondition; do not synthesize.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions fail.
